Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6
In this training with Brian, you are going to learn the quick ins and outs of running YouTube ads to your offer. YouTube is something that can be
accomplished after you have already ran your first event with no marketing cost. With Brian's help you will quickly understand the framework of
a successful l YouTube campaign.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Create a YouTube channel if you don't already.
Create a Google Ads account if you don't have one already.
Link your YouTube Channel to a Google Ads account.
Create a Google Analytics account.
Film your first video ad.
Create your first video campaign.
